summary: Completed backend and frontend validation for recruiter portfolio routes, accessibility/navigation flows, and contact integration in intentionally unconfigured Resend state.
action_items: No blocking defects found in tested scope; keep CONTACT_RECIPIENT_EMAIL and RESEND_API_KEY unset until production onboarding is ready.
Optional: monitor/ignore Cloudflare RUM request abort console noise if it appears in previews.
critical_code_review_comments: Core implementation matches requested truthful-unconfigured contact behavior (POST /api/contact -> 503, GET /api/contact/status -> configured=false).
All recruiter-critical interactive elements tested had data-testid coverage and were operable on desktop/mobile.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Verified /portfolio load, both project routes, research route, /portofolio redirect, theme toggle, skip link focus, desktop/mobile nav interactions including Escape and close button, mobile no-overflow at 390px, contact client validation and preserved inputs on 503, backend import health, /api/health, /api/contact/status, /api/contact 503/422/202 honeypot behavior.
rca of the issue: No product bug found in required scope. Observed browser console 503 only for intentional unconfigured contact flow, and non-blocking aborted Cloudflare RUM requests from preview infra.
